request.description:
StartFragment

## ClubsList API

Endpoint شامل لإدارة الأندية (Clubs)، يدعم العمليات الأساسية: جلب، إضافة، تعديل، وحذف.

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}`

---

## Endpoints

### 1\. `GET /items/clubs/` — جلب كل الأندية

يرجع قائمة بجميع الأندية المسجلة في قاعدة البيانات.

**Response** **`200 OK`****:**

JSON

```
[  { "id": 1, "name": "اسم النادي" },  { "id": 2, "name": "أنكر ميسي" }]

 ```

---

### 2\. `GET /items/clubs/{pk}/` — جلب نادي بالـ ID

يرجع بيانات نادي محدد بناءً على الـ `pk` (Primary Key).

**Path Parameter:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `pk` | integer | المعرّف الفريد للنادي |

**Response** **`200 OK`****:**

JSON

```
{ "id": 2, "name": "أنكر ميسي" }

 ```

**Response** **`404 Not Found`****:** إذا لم يكن النادي موجوداً.

---

### 3\. `POST /items/clubs/` — إضافة نادي جديد

يُنشئ نادياً جديداً بناءً على البيانات المُرسلة في الـ body.

**Request Body (JSON):**

JSON

```
{ "name": "اسم النادي الجديد" }

 ```

**Response** **`201 Created`****:**

JSON

```
{ "id": 3, "name": "اسم النادي الجديد" }

 ```

**Response** **`400 Bad Request`****:** إذا كانت البيانات غير صالحة.

---

### 4\. `PUT /items/clubs/{pk}/` — تعديل نادي موجود

يُحدّث بيانات نادي موجود بالكامل بناءً على الـ `pk`.

**Path Parameter:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `pk` | integer | المعرّف الفريد للنادي |

**Request Body (JSON):**

JSON

```
{ "name": "الاسم المعدّل" }

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`****:**

JSON

```
{ "id": 2, "name": "الاسم المعدّل" }

 ```

**Response** **`404 Not Found`****:** إذا لم يكن النادي موجوداً.  
**Response** **`400 Bad Request`****:** إذا كانت البيانات غير صالحة.

---

### 5\. `DELETE /items/clubs/{pk}/` — حذف نادي

يحذف نادياً محدداً بناءً على الـ `pk`.

**Path Parameter:**

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `pk` | integer | المعرّف الفريد للنادي |

**Response** **`204 No Content`****:** تم الحذف بنجاح.  
**Response** **`404 Not Found`****:** إذا لم يكن النادي موجوداً.

---

## Response Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | integer | المعرّف الفريد للنادي |
| `name` | string | اسم النادي |

EndFragment

## Category API

This endpoint manages **product categories** with support for hierarchical (parent-child) structure.

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}/items/categories/`

---

### Endpoints

| Method | URL | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/categories/` | Get all categories |
| GET | `/categories/{id}/` | Get a single category by ID |
| POST | `/categories/` | Create a new category |
| PUT | `/categories/{id}/` | Update an existing category |
| DELETE | `/categories/{id}/` | Delete a category |

---

### Response Schema

``` json
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "string",
  "parent": null,
  "parent_name": null
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | integer | Unique identifier for the category |
| `name` | string | Category name (supports Arabic) |
| `parent` | integer | null | ID of the parent category (null if top-level) |
| `parent_name` | string | null | Name of the parent category (null if top-level) |

---

### GET — List All Categories

**Request:**

```
GET {{base_url}}/items/categories/

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`****:**

``` json
[
  {"id": 1, "name": "مفروشات", "parent": null, "parent_name": null},
  {"id": 2, "name": "كراسي", "parent": null, "parent_name": null},
  {"id": 3, "name": "كراسي خشب", "parent": 2, "parent_name": "كراسي"}
]

 ```

---

### GET — Get Single Category

**Request:**

```
GET {{base_url}}/items/categories/{id}/

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`****:**

``` json
{"id": 3, "name": "كراسي خشب", "parent": 2, "parent_name": "كراسي"}

 ```

**Response** **`404 Not Found`** — if category does not exist.

---

### POST — Create Category

**Request:**

```
POST {{base_url}}/items/categories/
Content-Type: application/json

 ```

**Request Body:**

``` json
{
  "name": "كراسي معدن",
  "parent": 2
}

 ```

**Response** **`201 Created`****:**

``` json
{"id": 11, "name": "كراسي معدن", "parent": 2, "parent_name": "كراسي"}

 ```

**Response** **`400 Bad Request`** — if validation fails.

---

### PUT — Update Category

**Request:**

```
PUT {{base_url}}/items/categories/{id}/
Content-Type: application/json

 ```

**Request Body:**

``` json
{
  "name": "Updated Name",
  "parent": null
}

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`** — returns updated category object.

**Response** **`400 Bad Request`** — if validation fails.

**Response** **`404 Not Found`** — if category does not exist.

---

### DELETE — Delete Category

**Request:**

```
DELETE {{base_url}}/items/categories/{id}/

 ```

**Response** **`204 No Content`** — category deleted successfully.

**Response** **`404 Not Found`** — if category does not exist.

---

### Notes

- Categories support a **hierarchical tree structure** — a category can have a parent category.
    
- Top-level categories have `parent: null`.
    
- The `parent_name` field is read-only and auto-populated from the parent category.

## CheckList API

This endpoint manages **checklists** — a simple list of named checklist items.

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}/items/checklists/`

---

### Endpoints

| Method | URL | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/checklists/` | Get all checklists |
| GET | `/checklists/{id}/` | Get a single checklist by ID |
| POST | `/checklists/` | Create a new checklist |
| PUT | `/checklists/{id}/` | Update an existing checklist |
| DELETE | `/checklists/{id}/` | Delete a checklist |

---

### Response Schema

``` json
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "string"
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | integer | Unique identifier for the checklist item |
| `name` | string | Name/label of the checklist item (supports Arabic) |

---

### GET — List All Checklists

**Request:**

```
GET {{base_url}}/items/checklists/

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`****:**

``` json
[
  {"id": 1, "name": "تم تصدير الخامة"},
  {"id": 2, "name": "تم تصدير الالوان"},
  {"id": 3, "name": "كله زي الفل"}
]

 ```

---

### GET — Get Single Checklist

**Request:**

```
GET {{base_url}}/items/checklists/{id}/

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`****:**

``` json
{"id": 1, "name": "تم تصدير الخامة"}

 ```

**Response** **`404 Not Found`** — if checklist does not exist.

---

### POST — Create Checklist

**Request:**

```
POST {{base_url}}/items/checklists/
Content-Type: application/json

 ```

**Request Body:**

``` json
{
  "name": "تم مراجعة الطلب"
}

 ```

**Response** **`201 Created`****:**

``` json
{"id": 6, "name": "تم مراجعة الطلب"}

 ```

**Response** **`400 Bad Request`** — if validation fails.

---

### PUT — Update Checklist

**Request:**

```
PUT {{base_url}}/items/checklists/{id}/
Content-Type: application/json

 ```

**Request Body:**

``` json
{
  "name": "Updated Name"
}

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`** — returns updated checklist object.

**Response** **`400 Bad Request`** — if validation fails.

**Response** **`404 Not Found`** — if checklist does not exist.

---

### DELETE — Delete Checklist

**Request:**

```
DELETE {{base_url}}/items/checklists/{id}/

 ```

**Response** **`204 No Content`** — checklist deleted successfully.

**Response** **`404 Not Found`** — if checklist does not exist.

---

### Notes

- Each checklist item has only a `name` field — it is a simple flat list with no hierarchy.
    
- The `name` field supports Arabic text.

## Item API

This endpoint manages **items** — products that belong to a category and have associated checklists tracking their status.

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}/items/items/`

---

### Endpoints

| Method | URL | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/items/` | Get all items |
| GET | `/items/{id}` | Get a single item by ID |
| POST | `/items/` | Create a new item |
| PUT | `/items/{id}` | Update an existing item |
| DELETE | `/items/{id}` | Delete an item |

---

### Response Schema

``` json
{
  "id": 1,
  "category": 1,
  "category_name": "مفروشات",
  "item_code": "BLACKOUT_CURTAINS_1",
  "description": "ستائر لزوم المكاتب الادارية مقاسات مختلفة",
  "checklists": [
    {
      "id": 4,
      "checklist_name": "مصر في كاس العالم",
      "is_completed": true,
      "updated_at": "2026-07-07T12:21:43.778001+03:00"
    }
  ]
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | integer | Unique identifier for the item |
| `category` | integer | ID of the category this item belongs to |
| `category_name` | string | Name of the category (read-only) |
| `item_code` | string | Unique code/SKU for the item |
| `description` | string | Description of the item (supports Arabic) |
| `checklists` | array | List of checklist entries associated with this item |
| `checklists[].id` | integer | Unique ID of the checklist entry |
| `checklists[].checklist_name` | string | Name of the checklist |
| `checklists[].is_completed` | boolean | Whether this checklist step is completed |
| `checklists[].updated_at` | datetime | Last update timestamp (ISO 8601) |

---

### GET — List All Items

**Request:**

```
GET {{base_url}}/items/items/

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`****:**

``` json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "category": 1,
    "category_name": "مفروشات",
    "item_code": "BLACKOUT_CURTAINS_1",
    "description": "ستائر لزوم المكاتب الادارية مقاسات مختلفة",
    "checklists": [
      {"id": 4, "checklist_name": "مصر في كاس العالم", "is_completed": true, "updated_at": "2026-07-07T12:21:43.778001+03:00"},
      {"id": 7, "checklist_name": "مطولين شويه", "is_completed": false, "updated_at": "2026-07-06T14:46:28.410981+03:00"}
    ]
  }
]

 ```

---

### GET — Get Single Item

**Request:**

```
GET {{base_url}}/items/items/{id}

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`** — returns a single item object.

**Response** **`404 Not Found`** — if item does not exist.

---

### POST — Create Item

**Request:**

```
POST {{base_url}}/items/items/
Content-Type: application/json

 ```

**Request Body:**

``` json
{
  "category": 1,
  "item_code": "NEW_ITEM_01",
  "description": "وصف المنتج الجديد"
}

 ```

**Response** **`201 Created`** — returns the created item object.

**Response** **`400 Bad Request`** — if validation fails.

---

### PUT — Update Item

**Request:**

```
PUT {{base_url}}/items/items/{id}
Content-Type: application/json

 ```

**Request Body:**

``` json
{
  "category": 2,
  "item_code": "UPDATED_ITEM_01",
  "description": "وصف محدث للمنتج"
}

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`** — returns the updated item object.

**Response** **`400 Bad Request`** — if validation fails.

**Response** **`404 Not Found`** — if item does not exist.

---

### DELETE — Delete Item

**Request:**

```
DELETE {{base_url}}/items/items/{id}

 ```

**Response** **`204 No Content`** — item deleted successfully.

**Response** **`404 Not Found`** — if item does not exist.

---

### Notes

- Each item belongs to a **category** (referenced by `category` ID).
    
- `category_name` is a read-only field auto-populated from the related category.
    
- Each item has a list of **checklists** that track completion status for different steps/tasks.
    
- `item_code` is a unique identifier/SKU for the product.
    
- All text fields support Arabic.

## Get Club Categories

This endpoint returns all **categories** that have items linked to a specific club — with no duplicates.

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}/items/clubs/{club_id}/categories/`

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/clubs/{club_id}/categories/` | Get all categories linked to a specific club |

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `club_id` | integer | Yes | The ID of the club to fetch categories for |

---

### Response Schema

``` json
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "string",
  "parent": null,
  "parent_name": null
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | integer | Unique identifier for the category |
| `name` | string | Category name (supports Arabic) |
| `parent` | integer | null |
| `parent_name` | string | null |

---

### GET — Get Categories for a Club

**Request:**

```
GET {{base_url}}/items/clubs/1/categories/

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`****:**

``` json
[
  {"id": 1, "name": "مفروشات", "parent": null, "parent_name": null},
  {"id": 3, "name": "كراسي خشب", "parent": 2, "parent_name": "كراسي"},
  {"id": 15, "name": "مكاتب", "parent": null, "parent_name": null}
]

 ```

---

### How It Works

This endpoint queries categories through the following relationship chain:

```
Club → ClubItem → Item → Category

 ```

It filters all categories that have at least one item linked to the given club via the `ClubItem` join table, and returns them **without duplicates** (using `distinct()`).

---

### Notes

- Only categories that have **at least one item** associated with the specified club are returned.
    
- Results may include both **top-level categories** (`parent: null`) and **sub-categories** (`parent` has a value).
    
- This is a **read-only** endpoint — only `GET` is supported.
    
- No request body is required.

## Get Club Items by Category

This endpoint returns all **items belonging to a specific category** that are linked to a specific club, along with their checklist statuses.

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}/items/clubs/{club_id}/categories/{category_id}/`

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/clubs/{club_id}/categories/{category_id}/` | Get all items in a category for a specific club |

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `club_id` | integer | Yes | The ID of the club |
| `category_id` | integer | Yes | The ID of the category to filter items by |

---

### Response Schema

``` json
{
  "id": 5,
  "club": 2,
  "item": 1,
  "item_code": "BLACKOUT_CURTAINS_1",
  "item_description": "ستائر لزوم المكاتب الادارية مقاسات مختلفة",
  "quantity": 140,
  "checklists": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "checklist": 1,
      "checklist_name": "تم تصدير الخامة",
      "is_completed": false,
      "updated_at": "2026-07-07T12:17:26.386263+03:00"
    }
  ]
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | integer | Unique ID of the ClubItem record |
| `club` | integer | ID of the club |
| `item` | integer | ID of the item |
| `item_code` | string | Unique code/SKU of the item (read-only) |
| `item_description` | string | Description of the item (read-only, supports Arabic) |
| `quantity` | integer | Quantity of this item assigned to the club |
| `checklists` | array | List of checklist entries for this ClubItem |
| `checklists[].id` | integer | Unique ID of the ClubItem checklist entry |
| `checklists[].checklist` | integer | ID of the checklist |
| `checklists[].checklist_name` | string | Name of the checklist step |
| `checklists[].is_completed` | boolean | Whether this checklist step is completed |
| `checklists[].updated_at` | datetime | Last update timestamp (ISO 8601) |

---

### GET — Get Items by Category for a Club

**Request:**

```
GET {{base_url}}/items/clubs/2/categories/1/

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`****:**

``` json
[
  {
    "id": 5,
    "club": 2,
    "item": 1,
    "item_code": "BLACKOUT_CURTAINS_1",
    "item_description": "ستائر لزوم المكاتب الادارية مقاسات مختلفة",
    "quantity": 140,
    "checklists": [
      {"id": 1, "checklist": 1, "checklist_name": "تم تصدير الخامة", "is_completed": false, "updated_at": "2026-07-07T12:17:26.386263+03:00"},
      {"id": 2, "checklist": 2, "checklist_name": "تم تصدير الالوان", "is_completed": false, "updated_at": "2026-07-07T11:22:11.280256+03:00"},
      {"id": 4, "checklist": 4, "checklist_name": "مصر في كاس العالم", "is_completed": true, "updated_at": "2026-07-07T12:17:40.722937+03:00"}
    ]
  }
]

 ```

---

### How It Works

This endpoint queries through the following relationship chain:

```
Club → ClubItem → Item → Category

 ```

1. Filters `ClubItem` records by `club_id`.
    
2. Further filters by `item__category_id` to get only items in the specified category.
    
3. For each `ClubItem`, the serializer fetches `item_code` and `item_description` from the related `Item`, and all associated checklists from the `ClubItemCheckList` join table.
    

---

### Notes

- Returns an **empty array** **`[]`** if no items exist for the given club and category combination.
    
- `item_code` and `item_description` are **read-only** fields derived from the related `Item`.
    
- Each checklist entry tracks the completion status **per ClubItem** (not globally per item).
    
- This is a **read-only** endpoint — only `GET` is supported.
    
- No request body is required.

## Add or Update Item in Club

This endpoint **adds a new item to a club** or **updates its quantity** if it already exists — using a single `POST` request (upsert behavior).

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}/items/clubs/{club_id}/add-item/`

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| POST | `/clubs/{club_id}/add-item/` | Add a new item to a club, or update its quantity if already exists |

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `club_id` | integer | Yes | The ID of the club to add/update the item in |

---

### Request Body

``` json
{
  "item": 3,
  "quantity": 35
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `item` | integer | Yes | The ID of the item to add or update |
| `quantity` | integer | Yes | The quantity of the item for this club |

---

### Response Schema

``` json
{
  "message": "string",
  "data": {
    "id": 4,
    "club_id": 1,
    "club_name": "عبدالله بيك الكبير",
    "item_code": "DIRECTOR_DESK_37",
    "quantity": 35
  }
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `message` | string | Arabic message indicating whether the item was created or updated |
| `data.id` | integer | Unique ID of the ClubItem record |
| `data.club_id` | integer | ID of the club |
| `data.club_name` | string | Name of the club |
| `data.item_code` | string | Unique code/SKU of the item |
| `data.quantity` | integer | The quantity set for this item in the club |

---

### POST — Add or Update Item

**Request:**

```
POST {{base_url}}/items/clubs/1/add-item/
Content-Type: application/json

 ```

**Request Body:**

``` json
{
  "item": 3,
  "quantity": 35
}

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`** **— Item already existed (quantity updated):**

``` json
{
  "message": "المنتج كان موجوداً بالفعل في هذا النادي، وتم تحديث كميته.",
  "data": {
    "id": 4,
    "club_id": 1,
    "club_name": "عبدالله بيك الكبير",
    "item_code": "DIRECTOR_DESK_37",
    "quantity": 35
  }
}

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`** **— Item newly added:**

``` json
{
  "message": "تم إضافة المنتج للنادي بنجاح بالكمية المحددة.",
  "data": {
    "id": 7,
    "club_id": 1,
    "club_name": "عبدالله بيك الكبير",
    "item_code": "BLACKOUT_CURTAINS_1",
    "quantity": 50
  }
}

 ```

**Response** **`400 Bad Request`** — if validation fails (e.g. missing fields or invalid item ID).

**Response** **`404 Not Found`** — if the `club_id` does not exist.

---

### How It Works

This endpoint uses Django's `update_or_create` to implement **upsert** logic:

1. Validates that the club exists via `club_id` in the URL — returns `404` if not found.
    
2. Validates the request body using `AddClubItemSerializer`.
    
3. Looks for an existing `ClubItem` record matching the `club` and `item`.
    - **If found:** updates the `quantity` with the new value.
        
    - **If not found:** creates a new `ClubItem` record with the given `quantity`.
        
4. Returns `200 OK` in both cases, with a descriptive Arabic message indicating what happened.
    

---

### Notes

- Both **create** and **update** return `200 OK` (not `201 Created`) — check the `message` field to know which action was performed.
    
- The `club_id` is taken from the **URL**, not the request body.
    
- If the same item is sent again with a different quantity, the quantity will be **overwritten** (not incremented).
    
- This is a **write** endpoint — only `POST` is supported.

## Update Club Checklist Status

This endpoint **updates the completion status** (`is_completed`) of a specific checklist entry linked to a club item — using a `PATCH` request to modify only that single field.

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}/items/checklists/{pk}/update/`

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| PATCH | `/checklists/{pk}/update/` | Update the `is_completed` status of a checklist entry |

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `pk` | integer | Yes | The ID of the `ClubItemCheckList` entry to update |

---

### Request Body

``` json
{
  "is_completed": true
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `is_completed` | boolean | Yes | The new completion status — `true` (done) or `false` (not done) |

---

### Response Schema

``` json
{
  "message": "تم تحديث الحالة بنجاح.",
  "data": {
    "is_completed": true
  }
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `message` | string | Arabic confirmation message |
| `data.is_completed` | boolean | The updated completion status |

---

### PATCH — Update Checklist Status

**Request:**

```
PATCH {{base_url}}/items/checklists/1/update/
Content-Type: application/json

 ```

**Request Body:**

``` json
{
  "is_completed": true
}

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`****:**

``` json
{
  "message": "تم تحديث الحالة بنجاح.",
  "data": {
    "is_completed": true
  }
}

 ```

**To mark as incomplete:**

``` json
{
  "is_completed": false
}

 ```

**Response** **`400 Bad Request`** — if the request body is invalid or `is_completed` is missing.

**Response** **`404 Not Found`** — if the checklist entry with the given `pk` does not exist.

---

### How It Works

1. Looks up the `ClubItemCheckList` record by `pk` — returns `404` if not found.
    
2. Passes the request data to `UpdateClubItemCheckListSerializer` with `partial=True`, allowing only `is_completed` to be updated.
    
3. Saves the change to the database and returns `200 OK` with a confirmation message.
    

---

### Notes

- This endpoint uses `PATCH` (not `PUT`) because only **one field** (`is_completed`) is being modified.
    
- The `pk` in the URL refers to the **`ClubItemCheckList`** **entry ID**, not the checklist template ID or the item ID.
    
- Only `is_completed` can be modified through this endpoint — all other fields are read-only.
    
- To find the correct `pk`, use the [get_club_items_by_category](https://get_club_items_by_category) endpoint and look at `checklists[].id` in the response.
    

---

## Update Item Checklist Status

This endpoint **updates the completion status** (`is_completed`) of a specific checklist entry linked to an item — using a `PATCH` request to modify only that single field.

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}/items/items/checklists/{pk}/update/`

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| PATCH | `/items/checklists/{pk}/update/` | Update the `is_completed` status of an item checklist entry |

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `pk` | integer | Yes | The ID of the `ItemCheckList` entry to update |

---

### Request Body

``` json
{
  "is_completed": true
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `is_completed` | boolean | Yes | The new completion status — `true` (done) or `false` (not done) |

---

### Response Schema

``` json
{
  "message": "تم تحديث الحالة بنجاح.",
  "data": {
    "is_completed": true
  }
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `message` | string | Arabic confirmation message |
| `data.is_completed` | boolean | The updated completion status |

---

### PATCH — Update Item Checklist Status

**Request:**

```
PATCH {{base_url}}/items/items/checklists/1/update/
Content-Type: application/json

 ```

**Request Body:**

``` json
{
  "is_completed": true
}

 ```

**Response** **`200 OK`****:**

``` json
{
  "message": "تم تحديث الحالة بنجاح.",
  "data": {
    "is_completed": true
  }
}

 ```

**To mark as incomplete:**

``` json
{
  "is_completed": false
}

 ```

**Response** **`400 Bad Request`** — if the request body is invalid or `is_completed` is missing.

**Response** **`404 Not Found`** — if the checklist entry with the given `pk` does not exist.

---

### How It Works

1. Looks up the `ItemCheckList` record by `pk` — returns `404` if not found.
    
2. Passes the request data to `UpdateItemCheckListSerializer` with `partial=True`, allowing only `is_completed` to be updated.
    
3. Saves the change to the database and returns `200 OK` with a confirmation message.
    

---

### Difference from `update_club_checklist_status`

|  | `update_item_checklist_status` | `update_club_checklist_status` |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Model** | `ItemCheckList` | `ClubItemCheckList` |
| **Scope** | Global item-level checklist | Per-club item checklist |
| **URL** | `/items/checklists/{pk}/update/` | `/checklists/{pk}/update/` |

---

### Notes

- This endpoint uses `PATCH` (not `PUT`) because only **one field** (`is_completed`) is being modified.
    
- The `pk` in the URL refers to the **`ItemCheckList`** **entry ID**, not the checklist template ID or the item ID.
    
- Only `is_completed` can be modified through this endpoint — all other fields are read-only.
    
- To find the correct `pk`, use the [ItemListView](https://ItemListView) endpoint and look at `checklists[].id` in the response.
